Lone crabapple tree with a modest amount of fruit. Very astringent. Would be good for making ciderwine. could use a good pruning and canopy clearing. Access: Public.

Two edible crabapple trees between the fence and garage. The northern tree ripens couple weeks after the southern tree. Both taste great. in an apartment complex, so nobody is likely to say anything. Access: Private.
Trendwood Park is an unmanaged crabapple orchard. 100% public. Crabapple varieties are not posted. You’ll just have to experiment to see which ones are choice edibles. Access: Public.
